libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment or system properties are required. Meaningful tests should be Scala 3 tests that import io.circe.literal._ and exercise the json string interpolator with static JSON plus interpolated values, then verify the resulting io.circe.Json with normal Circe APIs.
risks: Java-only tests would not exercise the primary API because json is a Scala 3 string interpolator macro.
The macro implementation runs at Scala compile time, so native-image runtime coverage will mainly exercise the generated Circe Json values rather than the macro parser itself.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: circe-literal_3 is a Scala 3 compile-time JSON string-interpolator module; its POM already brings circe-core_3 and circe-jawn_3 transitively, and circe-jawn supplies the Jawn parser needed by the macro. No Docker service, extra Maven dependency, environment variable, or system property is concretely required beyond the normal Scala generated test scaffold.
